user.title: Unified To-Do Aggregator
user.description: Add credentials for the sources you want to aggregate. Leave a source blank to skip it — at least one is required. To create new tasks from Home Assistant, also set that source's destination (GitHub repo / ClickUp list). See the documentation for how to obtain each token.

data.github_repo_filter: GitHub repo filter (optional regex, e.g. sr2)
data.github_default_repo: GitHub repo for new issues (owner/repo, optional)
data.clickup_default_list_id: ClickUp list ID for new tasks (optional)
data.google_default_list: Google task list ID for new tasks (optional, default @default)

error.cannot_connect: Could not connect to the source. Check your network and try again.
error.github_auth: GitHub rejected the token. Check it has the repo scope.
error.github_repo_invalid: The GitHub repo must be in owner/repo form, e.g. jeffreyrdubois/sr2-code.
error.clickup_auth: ClickUp rejected the token or team ID.
error.clickup_team_required: A ClickUp team / workspace ID is required when a ClickUp token is set.
error.google_incomplete: Google Tasks needs client ID, client secret and refresh token.
error.google_auth: Google rejected the client credentials or refresh token.

abort.single_instance_allowed: Only one Unified To-Do Aggregator can be configured.

init.title: Unified To-Do Aggregator settings
init.description: Update credentials, filters, task destinations or the refresh interval. Tokens left blank will be removed.

data.github_repo_filter: GitHub repo filter (optional regex, e.g. sr2)
data.github_default_repo: GitHub repo for new issues (owner/repo, optional)
data.clickup_default_list_id: ClickUp list ID for new tasks (optional)
data.google_default_list: Google task list ID for new tasks (optional, default @default)

error.cannot_connect: Could not connect to the source. Check your network and try again.
error.github_auth: GitHub rejected the token. Check it has the repo scope.
error.github_repo_invalid: The GitHub repo must be in owner/repo form, e.g. jeffreyrdubois/sr2-code.
error.clickup_auth: ClickUp rejected the token or team ID.
error.clickup_team_required: A ClickUp team / workspace ID is required when a ClickUp token is set.
error.google_incomplete: Google Tasks needs client ID, client secret and refresh token.
error.google_auth: Google rejected the client credentials or refresh token.

create_task.name: Create task
create_task.description: Create a new task in one of the connected services.

source.name: Service
source.description: Which service to create the task in.

summary.name: Title
summary.description: The task title (GitHub issue title / task name).

description.name: Description
description.description: Optional longer description / notes / issue body.

due_date.name: Due date
due_date.description: Optional due date. Ignored by GitHub (issues have no due date).

complete_task.name: Complete task
complete_task.description: Mark a task complete in its source (closes the issue for GitHub).

source.name: Service
source.description: Which service the task belongs to.

task_id.name: Task ID
task_id.description: The task's source id (GitHub issue number, ClickUp task id, or Google task id).
